//: Cross-runtime registration example for the agent-sim stdio MCP spoke. Copy the relevant block into your client's MCP config. These are EXAMPLES, not loaded by the server.
//cursor: Cursor: .cursor/mcp.json (project) or ~/.cursor/mcp.json (global). Uses the same mcpServers shape shown below.
//cline: Cline (VS Code): cline_mcp_settings.json. Uses the same mcpServers shape shown below.
//codex: Codex CLI: ~/.codex/config.toml uses TOML, not JSON. Equivalent entry shown at the bottom of this file under //codex-toml.
//local-checkout: To run from a local clone instead of npx, use the node entry below in place of the npx one above.
